title: Arabis tilesii
intro: Arabis tilesii, also known as Chinese rockcress, is a perennial plant species native to China, belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Arabis tilesii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Arabis tilesii is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and capsules, to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress.
